description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical electronic device mounted on a slender, vertical stand with a circular base. The main body appears to be a directional microphone or sensor, featuring a metallic mesh grille at the front and a robust, dark housing. A visible cable extends from the rear of the device, suggesting it requires a wired connection for power or data transmission. The stand is made of metal or hard plastic, providing stability and height for optimal positioning. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality, suitable for use in urban environments such as public address systems, surveillance, or environmental monitoring. The finish is predominantly matte black with metallic accents, giving it a professional and unobtrusive appearance.
description: A cylindrical electronic device with a mesh grille, mounted on a sturdy vertical stand with a circular base and a visible cable. The design is robust and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical device angled downward on a tall stand, with the cable trailing to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the mesh grille and circular face of the device, with the stand and base directly below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cylindrical body and cable extending to the right, with the stand and base visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the device and the cable connection, with the stand and base aligned centrally.
